# World Real Estate Excellence Awards — Full Content Index
# Generated: 2026-06-11
# https://worldrealestateaward.com

## About

The World Real Estate Excellence Awards is an international, jury-led awards programme that recognises the world's leading property developers, architects, brokers, agencies, interior designers and luxury real estate brands across 90+ countries.

Established to celebrate and promote excellence in the global real estate industry, the programme operates across all major regions including Asia, Europe, the Middle East, North America, South America, Africa, Oceania and the GCC.

## Organisation

- Name: World Real Estate Excellence Awards
- Parent Organisation: Golden Tree Events
- Website: https://worldrealestateaward.com
- Address: Iris Bay Tower, Business Bay, Dubai, UAE
- Email: awards@goldentreeawards.com
- Phone / WhatsApp: +971 585862014

## Gala Ceremony 2026

- Event: World Real Estate Excellence Awards Gala Ceremony
- Venue: Westin Marina Hotel, Dubai Marina, Dubai, UAE
- Date: 14 November 2026
- Time: 5:00 PM – 11:00 PM (GST)

## Award Categories

1. Best Real Estate Developer
2. Best Luxury Real Estate Developer
3. Best Property Development Company
4. Best Residential Project
5. Best Commercial Project
6. Best Mixed Use Development
7. Best Sustainable Development
8. Best Smart Building Project
9. Best Real Estate Agency
10. Best Property Consultancy
11. Best Real Estate Brokerage
12. Best Luxury Property Agency
13. Best Property Management Company
14. Best Facility Management Company
15. Best Construction Company
16. Best Architecture Firm
17. Best Interior Design Firm
18. Best PropTech Company
19. Best Property Investment Company
20. Best Real Estate Marketing Campaign
21. Best Real Estate CEO
22. Best Real Estate Entrepreneur
23. Best Emerging Developer

## How to Nominate

1. Visit: https://worldrealestateaward.com/award-nomination
2. Complete the official nomination form
3. Submit supporting evidence and project documentation
4. Wait for jury review and shortlist notification

## Judging Criteria

Entries are scored by an independent jury of senior real estate executives, architects, urban planners and industry analysts against published criteria:

- Design Quality
- Innovation
- Sustainability
- Customer Experience
- Financial Performance
- Community Impact

## Benefits of Winning

- Globally recognised trophy
- Official winner's seal for digital and print use
- Editorial profile and media coverage
- Listing in the official winners directory
- Invitation to gala networking events
- Global press release distribution

## Eligible Entities

- Property developers (residential, commercial, mixed-use)
- Master developers
- Real estate agencies and brokerages
- Architecture firms
- Interior design studios
- Construction companies
- Facility management companies
- Property management firms
- PropTech companies
- Smart building developers
- Property investment firms
- Urban development companies

## FAQs

Q: What are the World Real Estate Excellence Awards?
A: An international recognition programme honouring outstanding real estate companies and individuals across 90+ countries.

Q: How are winners selected?
A: By an independent jury scoring against published criteria: design quality, innovation, sustainability, customer experience, financial performance and community impact.

Q: When is the 2026 gala ceremony?
A: 14 November 2026, Westin Marina Hotel, Dubai. 5:00 PM – 11:00 PM.

Q: How do I nominate?
A: Visit https://worldrealestateaward.com/award-nomination

Q: Who can enter?
A: Any real estate developer, agency, broker, architect, interior designer, construction firm, smart-building company, property manager or proptech innovator.
